description.en: Returns the bounds rectangle of the target element as aDOMRectReadOnly. The bounds are computed as described in the documentation forElement.getBoundingClientRect().

excerpt.es: Returns the bounds rectangle of the target element as aDOMRectReadOnly. The bounds are computed as described in the documentation forElement.getBoundingClientRect().
